text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Shuka Sho! But Trainer looks
awfully worried for some reason...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's only one thing to do at times like this: listen to my rendition of Brilliant Phantasia, the song exclusive to the Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right, we're like a princess and her prince!
I'll punish my foes with a Princess☆Arm Bar!
